name: WFBE_NEURODEF_MIXEDPOS_HEAVY_WEST
notes: MIXED STRONGPOINT (HEAVY, 4 AI) — WEST. The premium 'hold this crossroads' emplacement, built for all-round defence. Two .50 cals on the front corners angled outward give interlocking arcs across the whole frontage (+Y) while covering each other's flanks; a TOW between them on higher ground kills armour down the main approach; a Stinger at the rear covers air AND the strongpoint's back. The heart of the position is a covered infantry bunker (Bunker/fortified nest) at the rear centre — the fallback the crew fights from if the guns are suppressed, and the reason this reads as a strongpoint not a gun cluster. HBarrier horseshoe on three sides (flanks + a rear screen) with bag-fence corner tie-ins gives 360 protection; the front is open for the guns; a gap by the bunker is the entrance. Wire on the forward flanks canalizes the assault into the crossfire.

objs.role: .50 (left corner) — arc front-left, interlocks with right MG
.50 (right corner) — arc front-right, interlocks with left MG
TOW — anti-armour down the main approach
Stinger — air lane + covers the rear/blind side
COVERED INFANTRY BUNKER — fallback fighting position (rear centre)
forward-left screen (does not block MG arc)
forward-right screen (does not block MG arc)
